title: Iran Declares Readiness for War
detail: IRGC Commander-in-Chief Hossein Salami declares Iran is 'fully ready for war on all fronts.' Supreme Leader Khamenei backs statement, calling protests a 'Western-Zionist plot.' Trump responds on Truth Social: 'Keep protesting, help is on its way.' Pentagon confirms accelerated deployment of additional assets to CENTCOM AOR, including expedited sailing orders for USS Abraham Lincoln CSG.
